response.justification: While Mr. Szabo brings extensive software development experience, including architectural design and agile practices across various modern technologies, his resume demonstrates minimal and very outdated C++ development experience, which is a core requirement for this role. Crucially, there is no mention of the industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) implementation, which are critical for the position.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development and architectural design.
Strong background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures.
Proficiency with agile methodologies, CI/CD, and modern web technologies.
concerns: Very limited and outdated C++ development experience for a C++-focused role.
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or SDL.
Lack of direct experience in industrial automation or relevant protocols.
